meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code for students.
content.answer_block: To overcome a lack of portfolio, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to accelerate your development lifecycle. By automating boilerplate and utilizing AI-driven architectural guidance, you can transform complex project ideas into production-ready code in hours. This setup demonstrates technical proficiency and modern engineering workflows to potential employers and hiring managers.
content.intro:
The blank screen of a code editor is the silent adversary of every computer science student. You have the theoretical knowledge, but when you stare at a repository with zero commits, the imposter syndrome hits. The industry doesn't care about your GPA; it cares about what you have shipped.

We are shifting the paradigm today. By pairing Claude Code’s terminal-native intelligence with the rapid prototyping capabilities of Antigravity, you are no longer just a student—you are a developer building real-world solutions. Let's turn your 'no portfolio' problem into a repository of high-impact projects.

steps.title: Initialize Your Workspace
steps.description: Establish a clean environment to ensure your AI-assisted development remains modular and scalable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a scaffold for a modern web application, including a clean file structure and essential configuration files.

steps.title: Define Project Architecture
steps.description: Use AI to outline your database schema and API endpoints before writing a single line of business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a robust database schema for a task management application with user authentication and real-time updates.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate prisma schema based on the provided architecture constraints'

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Eliminate the friction of repetitive setup tasks by leveraging Claude to write standard API handlers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate CRUD endpoints for the 'Task' model using the defined schema, focusing on clean error handling.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Create Express routes for Task CRUD operations with Zod validation'

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Testing
steps.description: Build confidence in your code by having the AI generate unit tests for every critical service function.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write comprehensive Jest tests for the Task service, covering edge cases like empty inputs and database failures.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'Generate unit tests for task.service.ts covering all edge cases'

steps.title: Refine and Document
steps.description: Polish your repository with professional README files and inline documentation that explains your technical decisions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a professional README.md that highlights the technical stack, setup instructions, and design choices.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'Update README.md with project architecture, installation steps, and API documentation'

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'thought process' file where you document why you chose specific libraries; interviewers love the 'why' more than the 'what'.
Use Claude Code to perform a 'self-audit' on your commits to ensure you are following conventional commit standards.
Never blindly accept AI code; force yourself to explain every function back to the terminal to ensure you understand the implementation.
Create a 'Portfolio Branch' in your repo where you polish the UI specifically for demos, leaving your 'main' branch for clean production code.
Integrate CI/CD pipelines early to show employers you understand how to move code from local dev to production environments.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, deploy it using a service like Vercel or Railway, document the deployment process in your README, and share the repository on LinkedIn to attract recruiters.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped with the workflow of a senior engineer. Stop waiting for the 'perfect' project and start shipping the one you have in front of you. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
